title: Thermal Construct
description: add Tinkers Compat to Thermal Expansion
body:
Thermal Construct Add tinker's compat to thermal expansion but what does this mean?

well it mean this mod add new materials for thermal materials(also support thermal extra)

Thermal Expansion, Thermal Integration, Mantle **1.11.55** or above and Tinkers Construct **3.10.0.67** or above required.

this mod add the following materials :

*   signalum
*   lumium
*   enderium
*   basalz bone(pour basalz blood on bone)
*   blitz bone(pour blitz blood on bone)
*   blizz bone(pour blizz blood on bone)

here the thermal extra materials we support :

*   soul infused
*   twinite
*   shellite
*   dragonsteel
*   abyssal
